name: pos-pro
description: Sistema Profesional de Punto de Venta
author: Alejandro Pérez Vázquez — APV Labs

scripts.server:prod: cd server && npm run build && node dist/index.js
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:desktop: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && electron-builder --win --mac --linux
scripts.build:desktop:win: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:desktop:mac: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:desktop:linux: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && electron-builder --linux
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.setup: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.reset-db: cd server && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.deploy:web: cd client && npm install && npm run deploy

build.copyright: Copyright 2026 Alejandro Perez Vasquez - APV Labs
